manifest.canonical_seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte, then 3-byte, then 4-byte, each bucket big-endian
manifest.shard_rule: split the 4-byte seed bucket by its first byte
manifest.match_rule: compare SHA-256(seed) prefixes directly against raw target bytes and regenerate every exact hit
manifest.scope: planning artifact only; no depth-4 seeds are enumerated by this script

source_forecast_summary.theory_conclusion: Current structured controls are consistent with near-zero random exact-prefix hit expectations; planted wins prove mechanism, not natural prevalence.

required_before_running_all_shards: or a new independent transform/corpus lead with stronger evidence
stop_rules: run a small pilot shard first
stop if observed prefix>=6 is below random expectation and exact hits remain zero
stop if memory or runtime exceeds the shard budget by more than 2x
do not interpret prefix-only movement as compression
promotion_gate.conclusion: Depth-4 shard execution remains gated because the depth-3 frontier found only prefix movement and no exact records.
